-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I don't think this PR is valid, i.e., iconv.h does not include
_libiconv_compath.h any more:

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/include/iconv.h?r1=257582&r2=257583

Most likely, you forgot "make installworld".

Jung-uk Kim
